commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Behold, every one that uses proverbs shall use this proverb against you, saying, As is the mother, so is her daughter. They too commonly (Calmet) follow bad parents. (Juvenal vi. ) Jerusalem is more wicked than the Cethite, (Haydock) her mother, ver. (Calmet) Even this nation had once received the principles of true religion from the patriarchs, but cast them off to embrace idolatry, and to destroy her children. (Haydock) Jerusalem was formerly and is still wicked. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
